description: Integrate UMLS Metathesaurus into terminology and translation support
known_blockers: UMLS UTS license and credentials are required before any payload access.
Metathesaurus source files and CUIs may be redistribution-restricted.
Source vocabulary provenance must be retained so mappings do not imply UMLS endorsement.

UMLS license, UTS account/API key, source-vocabulary restrictions, and release-file terms must be cleared before committing MRCONSO, MRREL, MRSAB, CUI/AUI atoms, source labels, source relationships, full API responses, or release payload rows.
expected_blockers: Large release files may require local-only cache and incremental extraction.
Concept-level mappings can collapse clinically distinct HPO terms if source-vocabulary context is ignored.
blocker_owner: track implementer until reassigned in Phase 0
fallback_path: Use metadata-only governance records, source-version references, and payload-free review scaffolds until UMLS license, API key, release-file terms, and source-vocabulary redistribution constraints are confirmed.

evidence_score_policy.promotion_rule: no ontology or LLM signal promotes a translation without human review

last_run.source_version: UMLS 2026AA observed on NLM release/download documentation; no UMLS payloads downloaded
last_run.validation_command: pixi run build-ontology-network; pixi run validate-conductor; pixi run validate-ontology-network; pixi run validate-ontology-network-artifacts; pixi run test-conductor-validation; git diff --check
open_blockers: UTS account/API key required before API or release access
source-vocabulary restrictions must be retained and enforced
large release files require local-only cache and checksum/version pinning

restricted_payload_policy.commit_policy: commit metadata, schemas, bounded non-restricted samples, validation summaries, review-pack structure, and derived reports only after source terms are verified; raw, credentialed, private, full-release, and licensed payloads stay local-only
required_evidence: local-only manifest if any restricted source is touched
redaction or exclusion proof before commit

fail_fast_probe.scope: one authoritative source record, one normalized registry row, one provenance row, one candidate comparison or crosswalk edge when applicable
success_criteria: source authority and license state recorded
payload handling path classified as commit-safe or local-only
schema validation passes for the bounded sample
review pack marks LLM-derived content as candidate-only when present
